description: Manufacturing Execution System in production, multiple data-integrity issues uncovered during inspection prep.
audit_trail_status: audit-trail disabled on the batch-record entry module to improve performance

user_lifecycle.shared_accounts: operators on the night shift use a shared account 'operator-night' because individual provisioning slows changeovers

validation_status: production use without OQ complete on the recent module upgrade — IQ done, OQ pending
change_control: change applied directly to production without reason for change documented; reason for change: blank

electronic_signatures.notes: e-signature via password only; signature meaning: N/A

data_integrity.manual_transcription: manual transcription from instrument readouts to MES, not verified by second person
data_integrity.backup_treated_as_archive: backup serves as archive — no separate archive system
data_integrity.post_hoc_alteration: QA modified previous already-signed batch record without change control; backdated entry
data_integrity.dynamic_record_handling: dynamic chromatography record exported as PDF and static archived — raw data not retained
